parameters.name: before
parameters.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper limit on the number of objects to return, between `1` and `100`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order the results by the creation time.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Filter Connections by their associated domain.

parameters.name: organization_id
parameters.description: Filter Connections by their associated organization.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searchable text to match against Connection names.
